UserPromptSubmit.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$logPath = 'c:\Users\sablj\Documents\FAKS\ASP NET\LS_Projekt_ASP_2026\LS_Projekt_ASP_2026\.github\hooks\agent_log.txt'; $timestamp = [DateTime]::Now.ToString('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'); Add-Content -Path $logPath -Value ($timestamp + ' | UserPrompt: ' + $input) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"

preToolUse.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$logPath = 'c:\Users\sablj\Documents\FAKS\ASP NET\LS_Projekt_ASP_2026\LS_Projekt_ASP_2026\.github\hooks\agent_log.txt'; $timestamp = [DateTime]::Now.ToString('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'); Add-Content -Path $logPath -Value ($timestamp + ' | PreToolUse: ' + $input) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
